'''Cilia Dil''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] citizen who lived on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Junction V]] with her husband [[Jaren Dil]] during the final decades of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
Cilia Dil was a political dissident who aided in a rebellion against the [[Guardians]] of her [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]]. After being imprisoned by the Guardians, a force set up by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku's]] old rival, [[Lorian Nod]] she escaped with the help of [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]. Cilia eventually ended the Annihilator conspiracy set up by Lorian and was proclaimed as a hero.
